words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ عَدَمُ الْمُسَاوَاةِ الِاقْتِصَادِيَّةِ تَحَدِّيًا عَالَمِيًّا كَبِيرًا.
words.exampleBs: Ekonomska nejednakost smatra se velikim globalnim izazovom.
words.exampleEn: Economic inequality is considered a major global challenge.

words.exampleArabic: تُحَارِبُ الْحُكُومَةُ التَّمْيِيزَ عَلَى أَسَاسِ الْجِنْسِ أَوِ الْعِرْقِ.
words.exampleBs: Vlada se bori protiv diskriminacije na osnovu spola ili rase.
words.exampleEn: The government fights discrimination based on gender or race.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْعَى الْمُنَظَّمَاتُ الدَّوْلِيَّةُ إِلَى الْقَضَاءِ عَلَى الْفَقْرِ الْمُدْقِعِ.
words.exampleBs: Međunarodne organizacije nastoje iskorijeniti ekstremno siromaštvo.
words.exampleEn: International organizations strive to eradicate extreme poverty.

words.exampleArabic: تُثِيرُ الْهِجْرَةُ الْجَمَاعِيَّةُ تَسَاؤُلَاتٍ حَوْلَ الِاندِمَاجِ الثَّقَافِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Masovne migracije pokreću pitanja o kulturnoj integraciji.
words.exampleEn: Mass migration raises questions about cultural integration.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ اندِمَاجُ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ جُهُودًا مُشْتَرَكَةً مِنَ الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
words.exampleBs: Integracija migranata zahtijeva zajednički trud od strane društva.
words.exampleEn: The integration of migrants requires shared effort from society.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَزِّزُ التَّنَوُّعُ الثَّقَافِيُّ الْإِبْدَاعَ وَالِابْتِكَارَ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Kulturna raznolikost potiče kreativnost i inovacije u društvima.
words.exampleEn: Cultural diversity enhances creativity and innovation in societies.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَحَكَّمُ الْخَوَارِزْمِيَّاتُ فِي الْمَحْتَوَى الَّذِي يَرَاهُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُونَ عَلَى وَسَائِلِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Algoritmi kontroliraju sadržaj koji korisnici vide na društvenim mrežama.
words.exampleEn: Algorithms control the content that users see on social media.

words.exampleArabic: انْتَشَرَ الْمَحْتَوَى الْمُتَدَاوَلُ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ عَبْرَ مَنَصَّاتِ التَّوَاصُلِ.
words.exampleBs: Viralni sadržaj se brzo proširio kroz platforme za komunikaciju.
words.exampleEn: The viral content spread rapidly across communication platforms.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَمَتَّعُ الْمُؤَثِّرُونَ بِقُدْرَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ عَلَى تَشْكِيلِ آرَاءِ الْجُمْهُورِ.
words.exampleBs: Influenceri imaju veliku moć u oblikovanju mišljenja publike.
words.exampleEn: Influencers have a great ability to shape public opinion.

words.exampleArabic: اسْتَخْدَمَ الْمُحْتَجُّونَ وَسْمًا مُشْتَرَكًا لِتَنْسِيقِ حَمَلَاتِهِمْ عَبْرَ الإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
words.exampleBs: Protestanti su koristili zajednički hashtag za koordinaciju svojih kampanja putem interneta.
words.exampleEn: The protesters used a shared hashtag to coordinate their campaigns online.

words.exampleArabic: نَقَلَ الصَّحَفِيُّ الْبَثَّ الْمُبَاشِرَ مِنْ مَوْقِعِ الْحَدَثِ.
words.exampleBs: Novinar je prenosio prijenos uživo s mjesta događaja.
words.exampleEn: The journalist broadcast the live stream from the scene.

words.exampleArabic: تُهَيْمِنُ الْمَنَصَّاتُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ الْكُبْرَى عَلَى سُوقِ الإِعْلَامِ الْحَدِيثِ.
words.exampleBs: Velike digitalne platforme dominiraju tržištem savremenih medija.
words.exampleEn: Major digital platforms dominate the modern media market.

words.exampleArabic: تُشَكِّلُ الْأَخْبَارُ الْمُزَيَّفَةُ خَطَرًا حَقِيقِيًّا عَلَى الرَّأْيِ الْعَامِّ.
words.exampleBs: Lažne vijesti predstavljaju stvarnu prijetnju javnom mnijenju.
words.exampleEn: Fake news poses a real danger to public opinion.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْمَلُ الْمُنَظَّمَاتُ غَيْرُ الْحُكُومِيَّةِ فِي مَجَالَاتِ حُقُوقِ الإِنْسَانِ وَالْإِغَاثَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Nevladine organizacije djeluju u oblastima ljudskih prava i humanitarne pomoći.
words.exampleEn: NGOs operate in the fields of human rights and humanitarian relief.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَاهِمُ التَّطَوُّعُ فِي تَعْزِيزِ التَّضَامُنِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Volontiranje doprinosi jačanju društvene solidarnosti.
words.exampleEn: Volunteering contributes to strengthening social solidarity.

words.exampleArabic: أَطْلَقَتِ الْجَمْعِيَّةُ حَمْلَةً لِنَشْرِ الْوَعْيِ بِأَهَمِّيَّةِ التَّعْلِيمِ.
words.exampleBs: Udruženje je pokrenulo kampanju za širenje svjesnosti o važnosti obrazovanja.
words.exampleEn: The association launched a campaign to raise awareness about the importance of education.

words.exampleArabic: جَمَعَتِ الْعَرِيضَةُ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيَّةُ مِئَاتِ الْآلَافِ مِنَ التَّوْقِيعَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Online peticija prikupila je stotine hiljada potpisa.
words.exampleEn: The online petition gathered hundreds of thousands of signatures.

words.exampleArabic: تُنَظِّمُ الْجَمْعِيَّةُ فَعَالِيَّاتٍ لِلتَّوْعِيَةِ بِمَخَاطِرِ الإِدْمَانِ.
words.exampleBs: Udruženje organizuje aktivnosti podizanja svjesnosti o opasnostima ovisnosti.
words.exampleEn: The association organizes awareness-raising events about the dangers of addiction.

words.exampleArabic: أَبْدَى الْمُجْتَمَعُ الدَّوْلِيُّ تَضَامُنَهُ مَعَ الْمُتَضَرِّرِينَ مِنَ الْكَوَارِثِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Međunarodna zajednica je izrazila solidarnost sa žrtvama prirodnih katastrofa.
words.exampleEn: The international community expressed solidarity with victims of natural disasters.

words.exampleArabic: أَثَارَ النِّقَاشُ حَوْلَ السِّيَاسَاتِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ اهْتِمَامًا وَاسِعًا.
words.exampleBs: Debata o socijalnim politikama izazvala je široko zanimanje.
words.exampleEn: The debate on social policies attracted widespread interest.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ الْحِوَارُ الْبَنَّاءُ أَسَاسًا لِحَلِّ النِّزَاعَاتِ السِّيَاسِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Konstruktivni dijalog je osnova za rješavanje političkih sporova.
words.exampleEn: Constructive dialogue is a foundation for resolving political disputes.

words.exampleArabic: جَرَتِ التَّفَاوُضَاتُ بَيْنَ الطَّرَفَيْنِ عَلَى مَدَى أُسْبُوعٍ كَامِلٍ.
words.exampleBs: Pregovori između dviju strana trajali su cijelu sedmicu.
words.exampleEn: Negotiations between the two sides lasted for an entire week.

words.exampleArabic: لَجَأَ الطَّرَفَانِ إِلَى الْوَسَاطَةِ لِتَجَنُّبِ التَّصْعِيدِ.
words.exampleBs: Obje strane su pribjegle medijaciji kako bi izbjegle eskalaciju.
words.exampleEn: Both parties resorted to mediation to avoid escalation.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْتَمِدُ الْإِعْلَانَاتُ التِّجَارِيَّةُ عَلَى أَسَالِيبِ الإِقْنَاعِ النَّفْسِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Komercijalne reklame oslanjaju se na metode psihološke persuazije.
words.exampleEn: Commercial advertisements rely on psychological persuasion techniques.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ السِّيَاسِيُّونَ الْبَلَاغَةَ لِكَسْبِ تَأْيِيدِ الرَّأْيِ الْعَامِّ.
words.exampleBs: Političari koriste retoriku kako bi pridobili podršku javnog mnijenja.
words.exampleEn: Politicians use rhetoric to gain public support.

words.exampleArabic: أَعَادَتِ الْعَوْلَمَةُ تَشْكِيلَ الِاقْتِصَادَاتِ وَالثَّقَافَاتِ حَوْلَ الْعَالَمِ.
words.exampleBs: Globalizacija je preoblikovala ekonomije i kulture širom svijeta.
words.exampleEn: Globalization has reshaped economies and cultures around the world.

words.exampleArabic: أَدَّى التَّحَضُّرُ الْمُتَسَارِعُ إِلَى ضُغُوطٍ كَبِيرَةٍ عَلَى الْبُنْيَةِ التَّحْتِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Ubrzana urbanizacija dovela je do velikih pritisaka na infrastrukturu.
words.exampleEn: Rapid urbanization has placed great pressure on infrastructure.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَثِّرُ التَّغَيُّرُ الدِّيمُوغْرَافِيُّ عَلَى سِيَاسَاتِ التَّقَاعُدِ وَالرِّعَايَةِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Demografske promjene utječu na politike penzionisanja i zdravstvene zaštite.
words.exampleEn: Demographic change affects retirement and healthcare policies.

words.exampleArabic: تُعَمِّقُ التَّحَوُّلَاتُ التِّقْنِيَّةُ الْهُوَّةَ بَيْنَ الْأَجْيَالِ فِي بَعْضِ الْأُسَرِ.
words.exampleBs: Tehnološke transformacije produbljuju generacijski jaz u nekim porodicama.
words.exampleEn: Technological transformations deepen the generation gap in some families.

words.exampleArabic: أَصْبَحَ الْبُودْكَاسْتُ وَسِيلَةً إِعْلَامِيَّةً شَائِعَةً بَيْنَ الشَّبَابِ.
words.exampleBs: Podcast je postao popularan medijski format među mladima.
words.exampleEn: The podcast has become a popular media format among young people.

words.exampleArabic: حَازَ الْفِيلْمُ الْوَثَائِقِيُّ عَلَى جَوَائِزَ دَوْلِيَّةٍ مُتَعَدِّدَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Dokumentarni film je dobio više međunarodnih nagrada.
words.exampleEn: The documentary film won multiple international awards.

words.exampleArabic: تُبَثُّ الْأَخْبَارُ الرَّسْمِيَّةُ عَبْرَ قَنَوَاتِ الْبَثِّ الْإِذَاعِيِّ الرَّسْمِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Zvanične vijesti se emituju putem zvaničnih radio i TV kanala.
words.exampleEn: Official news is broadcast through official broadcasting channels.

words.exampleArabic: عَقَدَ الْمَسْؤُولُ مُؤْتَمَرًا صَحَفِيًّا لِلرَّدِّ عَلَى تَسَاؤُلَاتِ الْإِعْلَامِ.
words.exampleBs: Zvaničnik je održao konferenciju za štampu kako bi odgovorio na medijska pitanja.
words.exampleEn: The official held a press conference to respond to media questions.

words.exampleArabic: نَشَرَتِ الصَّحِيفَةُ مَقَالًا افْتِتَاحِيًّا يُنْتَقِدُ السِّيَاسَةَ الاقْتِصَادِيَّةَ.
words.exampleBs: Novine su objavile uvodnik koji kritizira ekonomsku politiku.
words.exampleEn: The newspaper published an editorial criticizing the economic policy.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْعَى وَسَائِلُ الإِعْلَامِ أَحْيَانًا إِلَى التَّأْثِيرِ فِي الرَّأْيِ الْعَامِّ.
words.exampleBs: Mediji ponekad nastoje utjecati na javno mnijenje.
words.exampleEn: The media sometimes seeks to influence public opinion.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَفَاوَتُ الرِّوَايَاتُ الإِعْلَامِيَّةُ حَوْلَ الْأَحْدَاثِ ذَاتِهَا بِشَكْلٍ مَلْحُوظٍ.
words.exampleBs: Medijske naracije o istim događajima znatno se razlikuju.
words.exampleEn: Media narratives about the same events differ significantly.

words.exampleArabic: تَلْعَبُ الصَّحَافَةُ الِاسْتِقْصَائِيَّةُ دَوْرًا مُحَوَّرِيًّا فِي كَشْفِ الْفَسَادِ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživačko novinarstvo igra ključnu ulogu u razotkrivanju korupcije.
words.exampleEn: Investigative journalism plays a pivotal role in uncovering corruption.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَعَرَّضُ حُرِّيَّةُ الصَّحَافَةِ لِلتَّهْدِيدِ حِينَ تَشْتَدُّ الرَّقَابَةُ الإِعْلَامِيَّةُ.
words.exampleBs: Sloboda štampe je ugrožena kada se medijska cenzura pojača.
words.exampleEn: Press freedom is threatened when media censorship intensifies.

words.exampleArabic: تُعَدُّ حُرِّيَّةُ التَّعْبِيرِ رُكِيزَةً أَسَاسِيَّةً مِنْ رَكَائِزِ الدِّيمُقْرَاطِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Sloboda izražavanja smatra se temeljnim stupom demokratije.
words.exampleEn: Freedom of expression is considered a fundamental pillar of democracy.

words.exampleArabic: يَدْرُسُ عُلَمَاءُ الِاجْتِمَاعِ الظَّوَاهِرَ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةَ وَأَسْبَابَهَا.
words.exampleBs: Sociolozi proučavaju društvene pojave i njihove uzroke.
words.exampleEn: Sociologists study social phenomena and their causes.

words.exampleArabic: كَشَفَ الِاسْتِطْلَاعُ الِاجْتِمَاعِيُّ عَنْ تَحَوُّلَاتٍ مَلْحُوظَةٍ فِي قِيَمِ الشَّبَابِ.
words.exampleBs: Društveno istraživanje je otkrilo zamjetne promjene u vrijednostima mladih.
words.exampleEn: The social survey revealed notable shifts in youth values.

words.exampleArabic: تَنْبَثِقُ الْمَسْؤُولِيَّةُ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةُ مِنَ الِالْتِزَامِ الْأَخْلَاقِيِّ تِجَاهَ الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
words.exampleBs: Društvena odgovornost proizilazi iz moralne obaveze prema zajednici.
words.exampleEn: Social responsibility stems from a moral commitment to society.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَدِّي الْمُجْتَمَعُ الْمَدَنِيُّ دَوْرًا مُهِمًّا فِي مُرَاقَبَةِ أَدَاءِ الْحُكُومَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Civilno društvo igra važnu ulogu u nadzoru rada vlada.
words.exampleEn: Civil society plays an important role in monitoring government performance.

words.exampleArabic: شَارَكَ الْآلَافُ فِي الِاحْتِجَاجَاتِ ضِدَّ الْقَوَانِينِ الْجَدِيدَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Hiljade je učestvovalo u protestima protiv novih zakona.
words.exampleEn: Thousands participated in protests against the new laws.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ يَكُونَ الإِعْلَامُ خَالِيًا مِنَ التَّحَيُّزِ السِّيَاسِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Mediji bi trebali biti slobodni od političke pristranosti.
words.exampleEn: The media should be free from political bias.

words.exampleArabic: يُشَكِّلُ التَّضْلِيلُ الإِعْلَامِيُّ خَطَرًا عَلَى الدِّيمُقْرَاطِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Medijska dezinformacija predstavlja prijetnju demokratiji.
words.exampleEn: Media disinformation poses a threat to democracy.

words.exampleArabic: تُسَاهِمُ خَوَارِزْمِيَّاتُ التَّوَاصُلِ فِي تَشْكِيلِ صُدًى صَوْتِيٍّ رَقْمِيٍّ يُعَزِّزُ قَنَاعَاتِ الْمُسْتَخْدِمِ.
words.exampleBs: Algoritmi društvenih mreža doprinose stvaranju digitalne eho komore koja pojačava uvjerenja korisnika.
words.exampleEn: Social media algorithms contribute to creating a digital echo chamber that reinforces user beliefs.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ الْوَعْيُ الإِعْلَامِيُّ مَهَارَةً ضَرُورِيَّةً فِي الْعَصْرِ الرَّقْمِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Medijska pismenost smatra se neophodnom vještinom u digitalnom dobu.
words.exampleEn: Media literacy is considered a necessary skill in the digital age.

words.exampleArabic: يَكْفُلُ الْقَانُونُ الصَّحَفِيُّ حَقَّ الرَّدِّ لِكُلِّ مَنْ تَمَسُّهُ التَّقَارِيرُ الإِعْلَامِيَّةُ.
words.exampleBs: Novinarski zakon garantuje pravo na odgovor svakom koga se tiču medijski izvještaji.
words.exampleEn: Press law guarantees the right of reply to anyone affected by media reports.

words.exampleArabic: يُمَارِسُ الْمُثَقَّفُونَ قِيَادَةَ الرَّأْيِ عَبْرَ الْكِتَابَةِ وَالتَّعْلِيقِ الْعَلَنِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Intelektualci vrše liderstvo mišljenja putem pisanja i javnog komentarisanja.
words.exampleEn: Intellectuals exercise opinion leadership through writing and public commentary.

words.exampleArabic: بَاتَتِ الهُوِيَّةُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ امْتِدَادًا لِشَخْصِيَّةِ الْفَرْدِ فِي الْعَصْرِ الْحَدِيثِ.
words.exampleBs: Digitalni identitet je postao produžetak ličnosti pojedinca u modernom dobu.
words.exampleEn: Digital identity has become an extension of the individual's personality in the modern age.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَاهِمُ الِانْتِشَارُ الإِعْلَامِيُّ فِي تَشْكِيلِ الثَّقَافَةِ الشَّعْبِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Medijsko širenje doprinosi oblikovanju popularne kulture.
words.exampleEn: Media diffusion contributes to shaping popular culture.

words.exampleArabic: تُطَالِبُ مُنَظَّمَاتُ الْمُجْتَمَعِ الْمَدَنِيِّ بِالشَّفَافِيَّةِ فِي الإِنْفَاقِ الْعَامِّ.
words.exampleBs: Organizacije civilnog društva zahtijevaju transparentnost u javnoj potrošnji.
words.exampleEn: Civil society organizations demand transparency in public spending.

words.exampleArabic: تُشَجِّعُ الْبَلَدِيَّةُ الْمُشَارَكَةَ الْمَجْتَمَعِيَّةَ فِي صِيَاغَةِ السِّيَاسَاتِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Općina potiče angažman zajednice u oblikovanju lokalnih politika.
words.exampleEn: The municipality encourages community engagement in shaping local policies.
